messages.author: Flesh Kimmeh
messages.text: I've written some custom firmware in async rust, and this is by far the most stable I've gotten it. it feels great to use, honestly. I use "wait_for_any_edge", because the sensor is a hall effect sensor and the ball just spins a magnet next to it, meaning the value would jump between high and low depending on which side of the magnet it's seeing. (edited)
messages.content_html: I've written some custom firmware in async rust, and this is by far the most stable I've gotten it. it feels great to use, honestly. I use "wait_for_any_edge", because the sensor is a hall effect sensor and the ball just spins a magnet next to it, meaning the value would jump between high and low depending on which side of the magnet it's seeing. (edited)
